settings.subtitle_text: A nature-crafted formula, thoughtfully sourced and expertly blended to elevate your everyday ritual.

settings.stat_text: It delivers a deep, long-lasting clean without the use of harsh chemicals, making it hypoallergenic, non-toxic, vegan-friendly, and safe for skin, pets, and the planet.

settings.heading: Nature's Finest Essences
settings.text: Every Vanrosector ingredient is sourced from nature's most potent botanicals — chosen for efficacy and purity.

settings.heading: Gentle Yet Powerful
settings.text: Our formulas are free from harsh sulphates and synthetic fragrances — kind to skin, effective for results.

settings.heading: Eco-Conscious Ritual
settings.text: Sustainably produced with biodegradable packaging — a ritual you can feel good about.

settings.author: Priya M.
settings.title: My skin has never felt better
settings.text: I've been using Vanrosector for a month and the difference is incredible. Texture improved, hydration locked in all day.

settings.author: Arjun S.
settings.title: Clean formula that actually works
settings.text: Love that there are no harsh chemicals. It's gentle on my sensitive skin and the results are real.

settings.author: Divya K.
settings.title: Worth every rupee
settings.text: Premium quality, natural scent, gorgeous packaging. Will not go back to chemical-laden alternatives.
